scenarios.name: Spec-first plan for team invitations feature
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a reasonable design doc but typically omits Non-Goals, the Alternatives Considered table, and a percentage-based Rollout Plan with rollback trigger; the treatment uses the documented 10-section template with testable acceptance criteria and explicit out-of-scope items.

scenarios.name: RFC for REST to tRPC migration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers migration phases and rollback at a high level; the treatment follows the template's Alternatives Considered table (GraphQL/gRPC with pros/cons/decision), phased Implementation Plan with parallel running, and a Rollout Plan that names a feature flag, 5%/25%/100% rollout, and a metric-based rollback trigger.
